name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Miami's Value Pawn & Jewelry at Bird Rd provides fast cash for jewelry, electronics, and valuables.
description_long:
Located at 7290 Bird Rd in Miami, FL, Value Pawn & Jewelry serves the Bird Rd corridor and surrounding Miami neighborhoods. This standalone pawn shop is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, and Saturday 9 AM to 5 PM, making it convenient for after-work and weekend visits. The store provides a straightforward pawn and resale operation in Miami.

At the Miami location, you can pawn jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, tools, and other valuables for immediate cash. The shop also buys items outright or offers layaway options. Call 305-266-7296 to speak with staff about your items or to ask about current pricing and terms.

If you need quick cash in Miami, FL, bring a valid photo ID and your items in their original condition when possible. This Bird Rd pawn shop handles the transaction efficiently and professionally. Value Pawn & Jewelry has multiple locations throughout Florida, and this Miami store is a reliable local option for fast cash.
pros: Extended weekday hours until 7:00 PM and Sunday hours 12–5 PM
EZ+ Rewards Program allows online pawn extension and layaway payments from any device
Instant Quote tool provides estimated item value online before visiting the store
Jewelry VIP Program includes guaranteed loan amounts and 100% trade-up credit on future purchases
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down payment required
Online shop updated daily with thousands of pre-owned brand-name items
On-site precious metal testing for accurate gold and diamond valuations
cons: Pawn loan fees, interest rates, and APR are not disclosed on the website
'Take Today' financing depends on third-party credit eligibility — not available to all customers
Auto loan details are entirely absent from the website despite being listed as a service
All merchandise is pre-owned; brand owners are not affiliated with or endorsing the store
Online payments not available in all states (excluded: Arizona, Oregon, Pennsylvania)
best_for: Consumers who own valuables and need fast cash without a credit check
Bargain shoppers seeking pre-owned electronics, jewelry, or tools at 25–70% off retail
People looking to sell or get an appraisal on gold, diamonds, or broken jewelry
Shoppers who prefer layaway over credit cards or financing
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best for Miami-area consumers who have assets to pledge and need same-day cash without a credit check, or who want deeply discounted pre-owned goods. The main caveat is that pawn loan costs are opaque — fees and APR are only disclosed in-store, so borrowers should ask for full terms before committing.
services: Retail sales of pre-owned brand-name merchandise
Online shop with daily new arrivals
EZ+ Rewards Program (points on pawn, redeem, sell, purchase)
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, free cleaning, stone replacement)
meta_description: Value Pawn & Jewelry at 7290 Bird Rd, Miami, FL. Get fast cash for jewelry, electronics, and valuables.
